findings.description: _PLUGIN_ROOT fallback in pre-edit-write-functions.sh computes $(dirname BASH_SOURCE[0])/.. which resolves to plugins/dso/hooks/ (one level up from hooks/lib/), NOT the plugin root plugins/dso/. The fallback needs /../.. (two levels up) to reach the plugin root. When CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT is unset, all path references using _PLUGIN_ROOT in this file will point to the wrong directory.

_PLUGIN_ROOT fallback in test_adversarial_review_prompts.sh computes $(dirname BASH_SOURCE[0])/.. which resolves to plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/ (one level up from skills/preplanning/tests/), NOT the plugin root plugins/dso/. The fallback needs /../../.. (three levels up). SKILL_DIR will point to a nonexistent path, breaking the test.

_REF_PATTERN in check-referential-integrity.sh is assigned inside single quotes: '${_PLUGIN_GIT_PATH}/(scripts|agents|docs)/...'. Single quotes prevent shell variable expansion, so the regex contains the literal string '${_PLUGIN_GIT_PATH}' instead of the resolved path. This regex will never match actual file paths in scanned documents, causing the referential integrity check to silently pass with zero findings. Must use double quotes (with inner escaping) or string concatenation to expand the variable.

dso-setup.sh uses ${_PLUGIN_ROOT} on the supplement_template_file call for KNOWN-ISSUES.md (line 200), but _PLUGIN_ROOT is never defined in this file. Under set -eu, this will cause an 'unbound variable' error and abort setup. Other scripts in this diff define _PLUGIN_ROOT at the top; this file was missed.

migrate_comment_refs.py was deleted but tests/scripts/test-migrate-comment-refs.py still imports it ('import migrate_comment_refs as mcr'). This leaves a dangling test that will fail with ImportError. The test file should also be deleted or the import updated.

Comment in check-plugin-boundary.sh line 8 says 'Allowlist location: same directory as this script' but the code now reads from .claude/hooks/pre-commit/plugin-boundary-allowlist.conf (a different directory). Stale comment should be updated to reflect the new location.

summary: Four critical correctness bugs in _PLUGIN_ROOT derivation: two files compute the wrong parent depth in the BASH_SOURCE fallback (pre-edit-write-functions.sh is 2 levels deep, test_adversarial_review_prompts.sh is 3 levels deep — both use only /.. which is 1 level), check-referential-integrity.sh has _PLUGIN_GIT_PATH inside single quotes preventing expansion, and dso-setup.sh uses _PLUGIN_ROOT without defining it. One important deletion impact: test file for deleted migrate_comment_refs.py was not removed. security_overlay_warranted: no, performance_overlay_warranted: no, approach_viability_concern: false
